calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-04-2019 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Feb-04-19 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Ligia Latino, Respondent/Plaintiff appearing on her own behalf;
Mark Fletcher, Respondent/Plaintiff appearing on his own behalf;
Jeffrey Chan representative for Appellant/Defendant, Potrero Automotive LLC;
Alex Lemieux, appearing as counsel for Appellant/Defendant, Potrero Automotive LLC;

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

All parties and witness are sworn.

Mark Fletcher, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on his own behalf.
Ligia Latino, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on her own behalf.

Alex Lemieux, Counsel for Appellant/Defendant, Potrero Automotive LLC cross examines appellant Mark Fletcher, Respondent/Plaintiff.

Alex Lemieux, Counsel for Appellant/Defendant, Potrero Automotive LLC cross examines appellant Ligia Latino, Respondent/Plaintiff.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit A - Handwritten bill of sale of the vehicle from Henisha Tobias to Ligia Latino, Respondent/Plaintiff dated August 18, 2017.
Exhibit B - Invoice from Potrero Autmotive LLC, to Ms. Tobias (original Sellor of vehicle)

Alex Lemieux, Counsel for Potrero Automotive LLC, testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant, Potrero Automotive LLC.

Jeffrey Chan, representative for Potrero Automotive LLC. testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant, Potrero Automotive LLC.

Mark Fletcher cross examines Jeffrey Chan, representative for Appellant/Defendant, Potrero Automotive LLC.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit 1 - CHP Vehicle Report
Exhibit 2 - SFPD Police Report

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: David H.S Commins, Clerk: William Trupek, not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Judgment Entered
